title: Frankfurter Dutch Tangy Sandwich
description: A twist on the classic sandwich, this recipe combines the flavors of Mexico with a tangy twist. Perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Sliced cheese (Monterey Jack or Cheddar work well)

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Place the frankfurters on the grill and cook for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until slightly charred.
Meanwhile, toast the bread slices on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the sandwiches by spreading a layer of tangy sauce on each toasted bread slice.
Add a cooked frankfurter to each sandwich, followed by a sprinkle of cheese, cilantro, radishes, and a slice of tomato.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
